subcodes.first_line: Praise befitteth and is meet unto the Desired One, Who, in establishing His Cause, hath not sought any proof save His Own Self [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد حضرت مقصودی را لایق و سزا که در اثبات امرش بدونش تمسک نجسته و ذکر
subcodes.subjects: @the truth of past religions and sacred scriptures, @corruption; misinterpretation of the Word of God, @corruption and decline of Islam; of the Shi'ih, @proofs of the Manifestations of God, @petitions to authorities, @chastisement and requital, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @praise and encouragement, @Word of God and human limitations, @Judaism; the Torah; the Jewish people
